message:
fix(scope): Add cross-block escape detection and improve hoisted var types

- Add detectCrossBlockEscapes to detect variables used across sibling blocks
  (e.g., variable declared in if-block's for-loop, used in sibling for-loop)
- Include for-loop targets as "uses" in variable ref collection
- Use i64 fallback for for_loop source (range() loops produce integers)
- Skip @TypeOf for literals (comptime_int) and attributes (function types)
